required_states: IAM Identity Center organization instance configured

conditions: An organization instance of IAM Identity Center is configured.
decision_context: Use for human workforce access rather than application workload credentials.
exclusions: Account instances do not support multi-account AWS account access.

source_references.locator: Configure access to AWS accounts, opening section
source_references.supported_proposition: IAM Identity Center integrates with Organizations for centralized multi-account workforce access.

statement: An organization instance of IAM Identity Center centrally manages workforce access assignments across multiple AWS accounts in an AWS Organizations organization.
